ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2010 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2010 Continued To Dec-06-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Plaintiff Jefrey Bonahach was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Andrea Miclut, a witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath but did not testify.
No appearance by defendant R. Randall Riccardo.
Default was entered against defendant on July 1, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 10, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Jeffrey Bonhach, and against the Defaulted Defendant R. Randall Riccardo as follows:

Damages/Principal - $143,885.91.
Attorney Fees - $1,817.00.
Costs - $1,365.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $147,067.91.

Judgement was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
